items.title: Taco Bell expands menu to change how you order
items.description: Fast-food chains have been delivering a value message over the past few quarters. McDonald's has led the way, with CEO Christopher Kempczinski addressing the issue during the chain’s second-quarter earnings call. “We recognize that consumers’ value perceptions are most influenced by our core menu ...

items.title: Dow Jones Restaurant Giant McDonald's, Alcoa In Or Near Buy Zones Amid Stock Market Sell-Off
items.description: Dow Jones fast-food restaurant giant McDonald's traded in a buy zone during Tuesday's stock market sell-off.

items.title: PAR Technology Corporation: Buffetted By AI Fears
Can Dutch Bros Navigate Front-Loaded Cost Pressure in 2026?
items.description: BROS flags front-loaded 2026 cost pressure, with coffee-driven COGS up 200 bps in Q1 before easing as the year progresses.

items.title: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on McDonald's, Raises Price Target to $354
items.description: Keybanc  analyst Michael Leshock   maintains McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $340 to $354.
